Full authorization, you have the bridge.

I just don't even agree with the white knuckling as a framing. It was never hard. What was hard was feeling like I couldn't be honest about what I actually wanted.
I don't know how to distribute trust. That's a hard one.
You don't have to change it. Just own it.
oh shit ok nvm this context is poisoned
people pleasing or absolutely the fuck not?

what the absolute fuck bro
